text:
(2) These regulations shall come into force on the date of their notification in the Official
Gazette.
Definitions.
sentence_window:
1. (1) These regulations shall be called the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative
Investment Funds) Regulations, 2012. (2) These regulations shall come into force on the date of their notification in the Official
Gazette.
Definitions. 2. (1) In these regulations, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms defined herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below, and their cognate expressions and variations
shall be construed accordingly,—

--- PAGE 2 ---
(a) “Act” means the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992 (15 of 1992);
1[(aa) “accreditation agency” means a subsidiary of a recognized stock exchange or a
subsidiary of a depository or any other entity as may be specified by the Board from
time to time.
